one_time_description: Rentals, interest and other revenue of $15,504,763 in 2022 vs $6,422,634 in 2021, likely including large boundary claim settlement trust distributions; wealth generation strategy reserve jumped from $8.3M to $21.6M suggesting significant trust income
economic_notes: Band operated enterprises include renting out band-owned equipment, lease income and other projects. First Nation holds investment in Argonaut Gold Inc. (publicly traded) with market value $4,386,350 at year end (cost $3,989,878). Michipicoten Development Limited Partnership investment of $10,099. Boundary claim settlement trust exists with First Nation as beneficiary entitled to all taxable income.
notes: Consolidated entities include First Nation of Michipicoten Cultural Association and Michipicoten First Nation Economic Development Corporation (fully consolidated line-by-line). Argonaut Gold Inc. shares declined significantly post year-end to ~$860,000 from $4,386,350 market value; management unable to determine if $3,130,000 decline is other than temporary. Large revenue spike in 2022 ($21.6M vs $11.9M prior year) driven by rentals/interest/other category jumping from $6.4M to $15.5M, likely from boundary claim settlement trust distributions. Wealth generation strategy reserve increased by ~$13.3M suggesting major trust receipts. Community and membership expenses include distribution of trust settlement proceeds to members. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,370,557 + Canada $1,081,209 + Ontario $448,394 + Aboriginal organizations $1,956,717 (note: Ontario First Nations LP and MFN trusts classified as non-government). Deferred revenue reconciliation shows $5,989,869 with additions of $5,989,869 and prior balance $3,781,596 applied fully to operations. No remuneration schedule included in the provided documents.
